name: Credit Counseling New York - Credit Repair | Fix My Credit
description_short: Brooklyn-based credit repair firm offering dispute resolution, credit report analysis, and score improvement strategies. Licensed professionals work to remove errors and negative items from credit reports.
description_long:
Credit Counseling New York operates as a credit repair service based in Brooklyn, New York, serving consumers looking to improve their credit profiles. The company positions itself as a specialized credit restoration firm with an emphasis on professional credentials and customer service availability. Founded to address credit report inaccuracies and negative items, the business focuses on helping clients qualify for better lending terms and financial opportunities. The company claims to operate with licensed and insured professionals dedicated to credit restoration accuracy and compliance.

The firm offers four primary service offerings: Credit Report Analysis (identifying inaccurate or negative items), Dispute Resolution (challenging errors with credit bureaus), Score Improvement Plans (step-by-step strategies to build credit), and Debt & Credit Coaching (financial guidance). Their website emphasizes removal of errors, disputing negative items, and boosting credit scores as core functions. They advertise same-day service availability and 24/7 accessibility, positioning themselves as responsive to client needs. The company claims 5-star ratings across Google, Facebook, Yelp, and the Better Business Bureau, though these ratings are stated rather than independently verified on the provided website content.

The company distinguishes itself through claims of licensed and insured professionals, guaranteed workmanship, and 24/7 availability. They specifically mention certified credit repair professionals and insurance coverage, which suggests regulatory compliance beyond basic business registration. The emphasis on same-day service and round-the-clock availability differentiates them from competitors who may operate limited hours. Their service guarantee language ("Workmanship Guaranteed") indicates confidence in their dispute and correction processes, though the specific terms and conditions are not detailed on the website.

A significant caveat is that the website makes broad claims about credentials ("licensed and insured," "certified") without providing verifiable proof, specific certifications, licensing numbers, or BBB accreditation details. The promise of 5-star ratings is stated without linking to actual independent review platforms for verification. Credit repair in the U.S. is regulated under the Credit Repair Organizations Act (CROA), which restricts what companies can promise and charge, but the website does not explicitly address CROA compliance or provide transparent fee structures. Consumers should independently verify credentials and understand that credit repair results depend heavily on the validity of disputes filed—companies cannot legally remove accurate negative information.

In the broader ecosystem of credit repair services, consumers have multiple paths to improving their credit. Professional credit repair companies can dispute inaccurate items with all three bureaus, while credit monitoring services provide ongoing alerts about changes to your reports. For those building credit from scratch, secured credit cards and credit builder loans offer structured approaches. Consumers dealing with overwhelming debt may benefit from debt consolidation loans to simplify payments, or credit counseling through nonprofit agencies for personalized budgeting guidance. Consumers who successfully repair their credit often find better rates on installment loans, secured credit cards, and other financial products.

pricing.guarantee_details: Contact provider for current pricing and guarantee details.

pros: Offers comprehensive credit report analysis to identify specific inaccurate or negative items
Provides dispute resolution services to challenge errors directly with credit bureaus
Claims licensed and insured professionals, suggesting regulatory compliance and accountability
Advertises 24/7 availability and same-day service, enabling quick response to client needs
Bundles credit coaching and debt guidance alongside dispute services for holistic financial support
Includes step-by-step score improvement plans customized to individual credit profiles
Guarantees workmanship, indicating willingness to stand behind service delivery quality
cons: Website makes claims about licensing, certification, and insurance without providing verifiable proof, specific license numbers, or credentials
5-star ratings are stated without direct links to independent review platforms (Google, Facebook, Yelp, BBB) for verification
No transparent fee structure or pricing information disclosed on the website, making cost comparison difficult
Does not explicitly address Credit Repair Organizations Act (CROA) compliance or legal limitations on what can be disputed or removed
No information about average timelines for dispute resolution or typical credit score improvements, setting unclear expectations
best_for: Brooklyn and New York residents with inaccurate negative items on their credit reports seeking professional dispute assistance
Consumers with moderate credit damage (multiple errors or unfair listings) who want guided improvement strategies
Individuals seeking ongoing debt and credit coaching alongside dispute services for comprehensive financial recovery
People who need responsive, 24/7 accessible credit support without geographic or scheduling constraints
diagnosis: Credit Counseling New York is best suited for Brooklyn-area residents and New York consumers with legitimate errors or unfair negative items on their credit reports who want professional dispute assistance combined with financial coaching. The primary caveat is that unverified credentials, lack of transparent pricing, and absence of CROA compliance disclosure require independent verification before engaging—consumers should confirm licensing, review actual third-party feedback, and understand that credit repair can only remove inaccurate information, not legitimate negative accounts.
services: Credit Report Analysis — identifying and documenting inaccurate or negative items
Dispute Resolution — challenging errors and unfair listings with credit bureaus
Score Improvement Plans — customized step-by-step strategies to build and boost credit
Debt & Credit Coaching — expert financial guidance to rebuild credit profiles
typical_results_timeline: Results vary by individual situation. Contact the provider to discuss expected timelines for your specific needs.
